title: Image2Sim: Scaling Embodied Navigation via Generative Neural Simulator
innovation_summary: Image2Sim: Scaling Embodied Navigation via Generative Neural Simulator: We introduce Image2Sim, a real-time neural simulation framework that constructs high-quality interactive environments from posed RGB-D image sequences.
